problem.title: Permutation Sequence
problem.description: The set [1, 2, 3, ..., n] contains a total of n! unique permutations.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Mathematical
solutions.description: Use factorial number system arithmetic to directly determine each digit of the k-th permutation without generating all permutations. At each position, dividing the remaining k by (n-1)! gives the index into the remaining digits, and the remainder becomes the new k for subsequent positions.
solutions.code_python:
from math import factorial

def getPermutation(n: int, k: int) -> str:
    digits = list(range(1, n + 1))
    k -= 1  # convert to 0-indexed
    result = []

    for i in range(n, 0, -1):
        fact = factorial(i - 1)
        index = k // fact
        result.append(str(digits[index]))
        digits.pop(index)
        k %= fact

    return ''.join(result)
